nasb.text: and one male goat for a sin offering, besides the continual burnt offering and its grain offering, and their drink offerings.

esv.text: also one male goat for a sin offering, besides the regular burnt offering and its grain offering, and their drink offerings.

cnv.text: 在常獻的燔祭和同獻的素祭，以及同獻的奠祭以外，還要獻一隻公山羊作贖罪祭。

ccb.text: 除了日常献的燔祭、素祭和奠祭以外，还要献上一只公山羊作赎罪祭。
